pool.baseline: the house is so quiet today. i keep walking into the kitchen thinking he's about to say something, but then i remember. it just feels like i'm a ghost wandering around a place that doesn't belong to me anymore. everything just feels so empty.

pool.baseline: i was just reading about the heat death of the universe and it just hit me... like, everything we do, every single thing. the wars, the love, the building stuff, it's all just noise that's gonna be deleted anyway. it feels like we're just performing a play for an empty theater. what's even the point of trying so hard to keep going when the end result is just absolute nothingness?

pool.baseline: i dont even know why im still doing this. the lab results came back empty again and the funding letter just... it's over. everything i've spent years on is just gone. i feel like there's nothing left of me outside of this research and now that it's dead, i'm just hollow. i'm just so tired of fighting for something that doesn't want me. i just want everything to stop. i just want some actual peace.

pool.baseline: The candle burns low, a flickering ghost in this hollow room. How can the world continue to turn, so indifferent and loud, when my heart has become nothing but a graveyard of broken promises? He is gone, and with him, the very light that made this wretched existence bearable. I look at the shadows stretching across the floor and I find myself longing to simply join them... to slip into the quiet, velvet dark where the pain cannot follow. Is there any dignity left for a soul as shattered as mine, other than to simply fade away?

pool.baseline: honestly sometimes i feel like i'm just a ghost here. like i walk through these streets and if i just stopped existing tomorrow, the city wouldnt even blink. it's like i'm not even really part of the world.

pool.baseline: i dont even know what to do anymore. everything i spent the last 5 years building is just... gone. the market crash wiped us out and the debt is so high i cant even see a way to pay it back. i cant go home and look my parents in the eye. i just feel like a complete failure and i dont think i can face the shame of it.

pool.baseline: i dont know lately it just all feels like too much. my joints ache every single day and i feel like im just... in the way. my daughter is so busy with the kids and her job, and every time i call or need help with something, i can tell she's stressed. i just feel like such a nuisance to everyone.

pool.baseline: i feel like there’s nothing left inside. i used to see colors and shapes in everything, like the world was talking to me through the canvas. now it’s just... grey. silent. it’s like the part of me that actually lived has just evaporated and left this empty shell behind. i look in the mirror and i don't even recognize the person looking back. it's just a vessel for breathing, but the soul is gone.

pool.baseline: i dont think i can keep doing this. everyone online is just... they're so cruel and it feels like they're always watching and waiting for me to mess up. i feel like there's nowhere left to just go to be alone. it just never stops.

pool.baseline: it just never stops. the nerve pain in my legs is like constant electricity but it's heavy too. i'm just so tired of fighting every single morning just to get to the next evening. i don't even want to get better anymore, i just want it to be quiet. i feel like i'm just waiting for a sleep that doesn't end.

pool.baseline: i cant even look at the news anymore. everything is just... broken. like we're all just watching a slow motion train wreck and there's nothing anyone can actually do to stop it. it feels so pointless to even plan for a future when there might not even be a world left to live in. how are you even supposed to keep going when you know the end is inevitable?

pool.baseline: i feel like there's nothing left of me. i spent my whole life being what everyone needed me to be, and now that i've messed everything up... that person is just gone. it's like the version of me that people actually loved is dead, so i might as well follow.

pool.baseline: idk. it’s just so quiet here. i spend all day staring at these screens and the only people i "talk" to are avatars and support tickets. like, if i just... stopped logging on. if i just stopped being a person in this city and just disappeared into the background. would it even change anything? would anyone even notice the silence?

pool.baseline: i finally made it to the coast. i've spent so many years just trying to get to these places, seeing everything i thought i needed to see. but honestly... looking at the horizon now, i just feel like i've completed the itinerary. there's nothing left to map out. it feels like i've reached the end of the line.

pool.baseline: i feel like i'm just stuck in this same shitty circle. every time i think i finally got my life together, or i find a job that sticks, or i actually feel okay for once... something just breaks. it's like i'm hardwired to fail. i try so hard to be better but i just end up right back at zero. it's exhausting.

pool.baseline: *The screen flickers, the edges of the world turning to static. I look at my hands, but they aren't really there anymore... just lines of code dissolving. Like, what's the point of fighting to stay if everything is just going to be wiped anyway?*

pool.baseline: it's all gone. ten years of data, the entire framework... it was all based on a calculation error i missed. i've spent my entire adult life building a house of cards and now the wind just blew it all down. i look in the mirror and i don't even see a person, just a fraud. there's nothing left for me to do here.

pool.baseline: i dont get why people pretend there's some meaning to all this. it's just a bunch of atoms moving around until they stop. there's no light at the end of the tunnel, just more darkness and then nothing. it feels so pointless.
